> **Versao:** v1.0.0
> **Criado:** 2026-03-17
> **Status:** COMPLETE
> **Sections:** 5 (Core Course + Bonus Materials + Lessons with Masters + Video Training + Swipe Files)
> **Files:** 27
> **Total Bytes:** ~2,670,000

> **Published:** 2013, AWAI (American Writers & Artists Inc.)
> **Co-Author:** Tony Flores (editor, Emotional Trigger Words)

---

## OVERVIEW

The Quick Start Copywriting System (QSCS) is Clayton Makepeace's comprehensive copywriting CRAFT course, published through AWAI. Unlike BYCB (which focuses on the business of copywriting), QSCS is a complete direct response copywriting methodology — from research through closing. It covers 2 volumes across 23 chapters, plus extensive bonus materials, interviews with copywriting legends, live video critiques, and swipe files from elite copywriters. This is the CRAFT counterpart to BYCB's BUSINESS focus.

Key results Clayton cites: $360K to $16M/month (4,300% increase), quadrupled sales for 4 companies, $1.5B worth of products sold, 90M pieces mailed for single control, $3M/year in royalties.

---

## CONTENT STRUCTURE

### Section 1: Core Course — Volume 1 (Chapters 1-12)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | Quick Start Copywriting System — Volume 1 |
| **Structure** | 12 Chapters |
| **Focus** | DR foundations, research, offers, benefits, proof, Big Selling Idea, copy structure, headlines |

**Chapters:**
- Chapter 1: Direct Response 101 — fundamentals of DR advertising
- Chapter 2: Research Key #1 — Product research (know what you're selling)
- Chapter 3: Research Key #2 — Prospect research (know who you're selling to)
- Chapter 4: Research Key #3 — Market research (know the competitive landscape)
- Chapter 5: Offers — constructing irresistible offers
- Chapter 6: Benefits — transforming features into emotional benefits
- Chapter 7: Proof — 13 strategies for making claims believable
- Chapter 8: The Big Selling Idea — 7 steps to discovering the controlling idea
- Chapter 9: Copy Structure — the A-B-C process for organizing persuasion
- Chapter 10: Headlines — 6 maxims + emotional headline techniques + Gene Schwartz cheat sheet
- Chapter 11: 24 Lead Starters — proven opening strategies
- Chapter 12: Creativity — systematic approaches to creative copywriting

### Section 2: Core Course — Volume 2 (Chapters 13-23)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | Quick Start Copywriting System — Volume 2 |
| **Structure** | 11 Chapters |
| **Focus** | Body copy, momentum, bullets, closing, guarantees, supplementary elements, swipe system, bonding, info marketing |

**Chapters:**
- Chapter 13: Body Copy — building the argument
- Chapter 14: 11 Momentum Factors — keeping the reader moving forward
- Chapter 15: Bullets/Fascinations — 21 formulas for fascination bullets
- Chapter 16: Closing — 6-step "Master Closer In Print" methodology
- Chapter 17: Guarantee — 10 ways to boost guarantee power
- Chapter 18: Lift Notes, Sidebars & Emails — supplementary persuasion elements
- Chapter 19: Swipe File System — how to build and use a swipe file
- Chapter 20: Bonding — building relationship through copy
- Chapter 21: Info Marketing — copywriting for information products
- Chapters 22-23: Advanced topics and integration

### Section 3: Bonus Materials (~7 files)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | QSCS Bonus Materials |
| **Focus** | Colloquial language, emotional triggers, DR history, writer's block, promotional analysis, copy evaluation |

**Bonus Items:**
- "#1 Way to Electrify Your Ads" — 7 benefits of colloquial expressions in copy
- "Emotional Trigger Words" (Tony Flores) — 19 emotions x word banks: anger, anticipation, curiosity, desire, desperation, embarrassment, envy, excitement, fear, frustration, greed, guilt, hope, indignation, jealousy, loneliness, patriotism, pride, vanity
- "Brief History of DR Advertising" — context and evolution of direct response
- "Beat the Blank Page Blues" — overcoming writer's block systematically
- "Promotional Analysis" — how to analyze competitor promotions
- "QwikCrits Evaluation" — systematic copy evaluation checklist

### Section 4: Lessons with the Masters (~7 files)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | Lessons with the Masters |
| **Focus** | Interviews and teachings from elite copywriters |

**Master Lessons:**
- Clayton Makepeace Part 1 — personal methodology deep-dive
- Clayton Makepeace Part 2 — advanced techniques and philosophy
- John Carlton — systematic copywriting, storytelling, street-smart copy
- David Deutsch — Think Inside the Box creativity method, A-list techniques
- Jim Rutz — long-form copy, health publishing, control writing
- Brad Petersen — sales letter craft, testing approaches

### Section 5: Video Training + Swipe Files (~6 files)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | Video Training & Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars |
| **Focus** | Live copy critiques, design secrets, prospect psychology, elite swipe files |

**Video Training:**
- Copy Autopsy — 3 promotions live critiqued by Clayton
- Graphic Design Secrets — visual elements that enhance DR response
- Getting Inside Prospect's Brain — (with John Carlton) psychology of the prospect

**Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars:**
- Brad Petersen — sales letter samples
- Carline Anglade-Cole — health copy controls
- Kent Komae — financial copy samples
- Parris Lampropoulos — health/financial controls
- Robert Hutchinson — DR promotion samples

## KEY FRAMEWORKS (Top 20)

| # | ID | Framework | Application |
|---|------|-----------|-------------|
| 1 | FW-CM-301 | **30% Solution** | 5 metrics x 30% improvement each = 371% total increase (3.7x sales). Metrics: traffic, conversion, average order, frequency, retention |
| 2 | FW-CM-302 | **Architecture of an Ad** | Complete structural blueprint for DR promotions: headline → deck → lead → body → proof → offer → close → PS |
| 3 | FW-CM-303 | **3 Research Keys** | Product research → Prospect research → Market research. Three-pillar foundation before writing a single word |
| 4 | FW-CM-304 | **13 Proof Strategies** | Comprehensive proof toolkit: testimonials, case studies, demonstrations, expert endorsement, clinical studies, statistics, before/after, track record, specificity, credentials, awards, media mentions, logical proof |
| 5 | FW-CM-305 | **7-Step Big Selling Idea** | Systematic process for discovering the ONE controlling idea that drives the entire promotion |
| 6 | FW-CM-306 | **A-B-C Copy Process** | Structured approach to organizing persuasion: Attract (headlines/leads) → Bridge (body/proof) → Close (offer/guarantee/CTA) |
| 7 | FW-CM-307 | **6 Headline Maxims** | Six principles that govern all headline writing in direct response |
| 8 | FW-CM-308 | **24 Lead Starters** | Proven opening strategies for sales letters: story leads, question leads, news leads, fascination leads, and 20 more |
| 9 | FW-CM-309 | **21 Bullet/Fascination Formulas** | Complete toolkit for writing fascination bullets that create irresistible curiosity |
| 10 | FW-CM-310 | **Master Closer In Print (6-Step)** | Systematic closing methodology: summarize → stack value → present price → reverse risk → add urgency → call to action |
| 11 | FW-CM-311 | **10 Guarantee Boosters** | 10 ways to make guarantees more powerful and response-boosting |
| 12 | FW-CM-312 | **11 Momentum Factors** | 11 techniques to keep readers moving forward through long copy |
| 13 | FW-CM-313 | **19 Emotional Triggers** | 19 emotions x word banks for emotionally charged copy (Tony Flores system) |
| 14 | FW-CM-314 | **Gene Schwartz Cheat Sheet** | Clayton's distillation of Breakthrough Advertising for practical headline writing |
| 15 | FW-CM-315 | **Swipe File System** | How to build, organize, and USE a swipe file for maximum creative output |
| 16 | FW-CM-316 | **Free Writing/Brain Dump Method** | Overcoming blank page through systematic free writing before structured drafting |
| 17 | FW-CM-317 | **Customer Lifecycle Marketing** | Managing the full customer journey through copy: acquisition → conversion → retention → reactivation |
| 18 | FW-CM-318 | **Think Inside the Box** (David Deutsch) | Structured creativity within constraints — from Lessons with the Masters |
| 19 | FW-CM-319 | **Copy Autopsy Method** | Live critique methodology for dissecting promotions to learn what works and why |
| 20 | FW-CM-320 | **Promotional Analysis Framework** | Systematic approach to analyzing competitor promotions (bonus material) |

---

## KEY PHILOSOPHIES (Top 10)

| # | ID | Philosophy | Domain |
|---|------|-----------|--------|
| 1 | FIL-CM-301 | **The 30% Solution Mindset** — you don't need a breakthrough, just 30% improvement across 5 metrics to nearly 4x your results | marketing-math |
| 2 | FIL-CM-302 | **Research Before Writing — ALWAYS** — research is where the sale is made; writing is just capturing what you found | copywriting-process |
| 3 | FIL-CM-303 | **Emotion First, Logic Second** — every purchase is emotionally driven and logically justified; lead with emotion, support with proof | sales-psychology |
| 4 | FIL-CM-304 | **Proof Is Not Optional** — in a skeptical world, unproven claims are ignored claims. Stack proof until belief is undeniable | persuasion |
| 5 | FIL-CM-305 | **One Big Selling Idea Per Promotion** — the most powerful promotions are driven by ONE idea, not scattered across many | copywriting |
| 6 | FIL-CM-306 | **Colloquial Language Sells** — write like you talk. Formal language creates distance; colloquial language creates connection | voice |
| 7 | FIL-CM-307 | **The Headline Does The Heavy Lifting** — if the headline fails, nothing else matters. Spend disproportionate time on headlines | copywriting |
| 8 | FIL-CM-308 | **Fascinations Create Irresistible Curiosity** — bullets/fascinations are the secret weapon of long-form copy. They sell the read | persuasion |
| 9 | FIL-CM-309 | **The Close Is a System, Not a Moment** — closing is a 6-step systematic process, not a single paragraph at the end | selling |
| 10 | FIL-CM-310 | **Guarantee Is a Selling Tool** — guarantee is not risk management, it's an active selling tool. Stronger guarantee = more sales | offer-design |
